comment: Block all traffic from known attacker IP (value loaded from config.yaml -> attacker_ip)
Block Telnet - unencrypted protocol, always treated as suspicious
Block default Metasploit reverse-shell / common malware C2 port
Block SMB - common ransomware/lateral-movement port, should never be open to outside hosts
Block RDP - frequent brute-force target, should not be exposed to untrusted IPs
Always allow DNS so the monitored device keeps internet access during testing
